name: short-session-fits-window
description: A 15-turn support chat against an 8K-token context window. The whole transcript fits, so no eviction ever triggers — the control.

name: long-session-small-window
description: A 200-turn agent session against an 8K-token context window — the transcript is roughly 9x larger than the window can hold.

name: same-session-wide-window
description: The identical 200-turn session as c02, replayed against a 128K-token window — isolates the effect of budget alone, holding the conversation fixed.

name: document-ingestion-stream
description: A 500-turn document-chunk ingestion stream against a 32K-token window.

name: code-review-session
description: A 60-turn multi-file code review conversation against a 16K-token window.
